;; ── Utils ──
(defn gen-id [] (str "n" (random-uuid)))

;; ── Global State ──
(defonce app (atom nil))

(defn nodes [] (:nodes @app))
(defn focused [] (:focused @app))
(defn mode [] (:mode @app))
(defn help? [] (:help @app))

;; ── Persistence ──
(def storage-key "vimflowy-data-v2")

(defn save-local []
  (try
    (.setItem js/localStorage storage-key (js/JSON.stringify (clj->js @app)))
    (catch js/Error _ nil)))

(defn load-local []
  (try
    (let [raw (.getItem js/localStorage storage-key)]
      (when raw
        (let [parsed (js->clj (js/JSON.parse raw) :keywordize-keys true)]
          (reset! app parsed))
        true))
    (catch js/Error _ false)))

;; ── Tree Operations ──
(defn node-at [id] (get (nodes) id))
(defn parent-of [id] (:parent (node-at id)))
(defn children-of [id] (:children (node-at id)))
(defn depth [id]
  (loop [n id d 0]
    (let [p (parent-of n)]
      (if (or (nil? p) (= p "root")) d (recur p (inc d))))))

(defn flat-visible []
  (let [nds (nodes)]
    (loop [stack (list (get nds "root"))
           result []]
      (if (empty? stack)
        result
        (let [node (first stack)
              remaining (rest stack)]
          (if (:collapsed node)
            (recur remaining (conj result (:id node)))
            (recur (into (mapv (fn [id] (get nds id)) (reverse (:children node))) remaining)
                   (conj result (:id node)))))))))

(defn index-of [id]
  (let [vs (flat-visible)]
    (first (keep-indexed (fn [i v] (when (= v id) i)) vs))))

(defn node-at-index [idx]
  (let [vs (flat-visible)]
    (when (and (>= idx 0) (< idx (count vs)))
      (nth vs idx))))

(defn sibling-index [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id)]
    (when p
      (let [sibs (children-of p)]
        (first (keep-indexed (fn [i s] (when (= s id) i)) sibs))))))

(defn prev-sibling [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id) sibs (children-of p) si (sibling-index id)]
    (when (and si (> si 0)) (nth sibs (dec si)))))

(defn next-sibling [id]
  (let [p (parent-of id) sibs (children-of p) si (sibling-index id)]
    (when (and si (< si (dec (count sibs)))) (nth sibs (inc si)))))

;; ── Mutations ──
(defn update-node! [id f & args]
  (swap! app (fn [st]
               (let [nd (get-in st [:nodes id])]
                 (if nd

                   st)))))

;; ── Normal-mode cursor helpers (app state :cursor-pos) ──
(defn focused-text []
  (:text (node-at (focused)) ""))

(defn cp [] (:cursor-pos @app 0))

(defn cp-left! []
  (swap! app update :cursor-pos #(max 0 (dec %))))

(defn cp-right! []
  (let [txt (focused-text)]
    (swap! app update :cursor-pos #(min (count txt) (inc %)))))

(defn cp-word-forward! []
  (let [txt (focused-text)
        len (count txt)
        pos (cp)
        i (loop [i pos]
            (if (and (< i len) (not (word-delim? (str (aget txt i)))))
              (recur (inc i))
              i))
        j (loop [j i]
            (if (and (< j len) (word-delim? (str (aget txt j))))
              (recur (inc j))
              j))]
    (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos j)))

(defn cp-word-backward! []
  (let [txt (focused-text)
        pos (cp)]
    (if (<= pos 0)
      (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos 0)
      (loop [i (dec pos)]
        (if (< i 0)
          (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos 0)
          (if (word-delim? (str (aget txt i)))
            (recur (dec i))
            (loop [j i]
              (if (or (< j 0) (word-delim? (str (aget txt j))))
                (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos (inc j))
                (recur (dec j))))))))))

(defn cp-word-end! []
  (let [txt (focused-text)
        len (count txt)
        pos (cp)]
    (if (>= pos len)
      (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos (max 0 (dec len)))
      (let [i (if (and (< pos len) (word-delim? (str (aget txt pos))))
                (loop [j pos]
                  (if (and (< j len) (word-delim? (str (aget txt j))))
                    (recur (inc j))
                    j))
                pos)]
        (if (>= i len)
          (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos (max 0 (dec len)))
          (loop [j i]
            (if (and (< (inc j) len) (not (word-delim? (str (aget txt (inc j))))))
              (recur (inc j))
              (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos j))))))))

(defn cp-delete-to-end! []
  (let [txt (focused-text)
        pos (cp)
        new-txt (subs txt 0 pos)]
    (set-text! (focused) new-txt)
    (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos (count new-txt))))

(defn cp-find-char! [ch]
  (let [txt (focused-text)
        pos (cp)
        next-idx (.indexOf txt ch (inc pos))]
    (when (>= next-idx 0)
      (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos next-idx))))

(defn cp-till-char! [ch]
  (let [txt (focused-text)
        pos (cp)
        next-idx (.indexOf txt ch (inc pos))]
    (when (>= next-idx 0)
      (swap! app assoc :cursor-pos (max 0 (dec next-idx))))))

 278 |     ;; Text
 279 |     (let [text-el (.createElement js/document "span")]
 280 |       (set! (.-className text-el) (str "text-node" (when completed " completed")))
 281 |       (if (and is-focused (= (mode) :normal))
 282 |         ;; Normal mode: render block cursor at cursor-pos
 283 |         (let [cp (or (:cursor-pos @app) 0)
 284 |               before (subs txt 0 cp)
 285 |               cursor-char (if (< cp (count txt)) (subs txt cp (inc cp)) " ")
 286 |               after (if (< cp (count txt)) (subs txt (inc cp)) "")]
 287 |           (.appendChild text-el (.createTextNode js/document before))
 288 |           (let [cur (.createElement js/document "span")]
 289 |             (set! (.-className cur) "cursor-block")
 290 |             (set! (.-textContent cur) cursor-char)
 291 |             (.appendChild text-el cur))
 292 |           (.appendChild text-el (.createTextNode js/document after)))
 293 |         ;; Insert or unfocused: plain text / contentEditable
 294 |         (do
 295 |           (set! (.-textContent text-el) txt)
 296 |           (when (and is-focused (= (mode) :insert))
 297 |             (.setAttribute text-el "contenteditable" "true")
 298 |             (.addEventListener text-el "input" (fn [_]
 299 |                                                  (set-text! id (.-textContent text-el))))
 300 |             (.addEventListener text-el "blur" (fn [_]
 301 |                                                 (set-text! id (.-textContent text-el)))))))
 302 |       (.appendChild row text-el))
 303 |     row))

 305 | (defn render-tree []
 306 |   (let [container (.createElement js/document "div")]
 307 |     (.setAttribute container "class" "tree-container")
 308 |     (let [vs (flat-visible)]
 309 |       (doseq [id vs]
 310 |         (when (not= id "root")
 311 |           (.appendChild container (render-node id)))))
 312 |     ;; Replace or append
 313 |     (let [existing (.querySelector js/document ".tree-container")]
 314 |       (when existing (.remove existing)))
 315 |     (.appendChild app-el container)))
 316 | 
 317 | (defn render-toolbar []
 318 |   (let [existing (.querySelector js/document ".toolbar")]
 319 |     (when existing (.remove existing)))
 320 |   (let [tb (.createElement js/document "div")]
 321 |     (.setAttribute tb "class" "toolbar")
 322 |     
 323 |     ;; Mode indicator
 324 |     (let [mi (.createElement js/document "span")]
 325 |       (set! (.-className mi) (str "mode-indicator " (if (= (mode) :insert) "mode-insert" "mode-normal")))
 326 |       (set! (.-textContent mi) (if (= (mode) :insert) "INSERT" "NORMAL"))
 327 |       (.appendChild tb mi))
 328 |     
 329 |     ;; Save button
 330 |     (let [btn (.createElement js/document "button")]
 331 |       (set! (.-textContent btn) "💾 Save")
 332 |       (.addEventListener btn "click" (fn [_] (save-local)))
 333 |       (.appendChild tb btn))
 334 |     
 335 |     ;; Export button
 336 |     (let [btn (.createElement js/document "button")]
 337 |       (set! (.-textContent btn) "📤 Export")
